items.name: Weather Orbit
items.description: Native weather widget with live metrics and an interactive sky scene.
items.input_hint: Plain text sets a weather location. JSON can pass location or coordinates.

items.name: Note Board
items.description: Native sticky note widget with editable text and agent-driven updates.
items.input_hint: Plain text replaces the note body. JSON can set title/text and append or prepend.

items.name: Timer Bloom
items.description: Native countdown timer widget with smooth progress and agent-driven control.
items.input_hint: Plain text can be a duration like 5m or 90s. JSON can set duration, label, and command.

items.name: Stopwatch Wave
items.description: Native stopwatch widget with lap tracking and agent control.
items.input_hint: JSON or plain text commands can start, stop, reset, or add a lap.
